sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Player position: {blue_player[0]['boundary']}")

# Check all blue objects
blue_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue objects: {len(blue_objects)}")
for b in blue_objects:
    print(f"  Position: {b['boundary']}, pixels: {b['pixels']}, hash: {b['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
